api_check.command_boundary: POST /api/qwen-brief with sample Japanese run; no secrets sent

response.packet_excerpt:
対象: Alibaba Cloud配置証明
要点: Function Computeで動く確認です
判断: 公開ヘルスチェックは可能
停止ルール: Qwenキーは入れない

claim_boundary: The backend is deployed on Alibaba Cloud Function Compute and reachable from the public internet.
The deployed public endpoint intentionally has no Qwen API key configured.
Live Qwen model proof is recorded separately in evidence/2026-05-28T014405Z_backend-qwen-live-smoke.json.
No raw API key is committed, logged, or exposed in this evidence file.
